title: feat: add dark mode support
body:
## Summary

This PR adds dark mode support to the dashboard.

### Changes
- Added `theme.rs` module with light/dark palette
- Updated CSS variables in `styles/global.css`
- Added toggle button in header
- Persists preference in localStorage

### Testing
Manually tested on Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17.
All existing visual regression tests pass.

comments.body: The toggle button accessibility looks good. Could you add an `aria-label`?
Good catch — added `aria-label="Toggle dark mode"` in the latest commit.
LGTM overall. Minor: the CSS variable names could follow our existing convention (`--color-bg` → `--bg-color`).
